cases.name: minimal-escape
cases.desc: Escaped RS in a value: necessary, canonical

cases.name: plain-table
cases.desc: Ordinary table, nothing escaped, no framing

cases.name: escaped-unassigned-byte
cases.desc: Escaped unassigned control byte: necessary (binary data), canonical

cases.name: gratuitous-escape
cases.desc: DLE before a byte >= 0x20 is gratuitous: decodes fine, not canonical

cases.name: trailing-eot
cases.desc: EOT is transport framing: not part of a canonical document unit

cases.name: etb-framing
cases.desc: ETB is stream framing: not part of a canonical document unit

cases.name: unassigned-code
cases.desc: Bare unassigned control byte: neither well-formed nor canonical

cases.name: dangling-dle
cases.desc: DLE at end of input: neither well-formed nor canonical
